title: Automating Proofing and Approvals with monday.com and PageProof

posts.author: justincsmith2015 (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Automating Proofing and Approval with monday.com and PageProof

Hi everyone! For those of you on a marketing and creative team, this webinar is a must!

We’ll be showcasing how PageProof’s integration with monday.com will supercharge your proofing and approval workflow, and enable you to have deep integration into multiple Adobe products.

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Event by Purple Plum Consulting

Tue, Apr 16, 2024, 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM ET (your local time)

Online

Event link: [https://purpleplumtech.zoom.us/webinar/register/4117123273572/WN_UGFb2PoOS-2oRxq-FGaSrg]

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: We have been using the PageProof integration with monday.com for a few years now and they work great together!

posts.author: justincsmith2015 (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml: @LKat So great to hear that!
